'''dhofawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keeperless|keeperless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keeperless|keeperless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhofawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhofawithi|dhofawithi]] || [[word:dhofawiji|dhofawiji]] || [[word:dhofawishi|dhofawishi]] || [[word:dhofawiki|dhofawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhofawuthuthu|dhofawuthuthu]] || [[word:dhofawujuju|dhofawujuju]] || [[word:dhofawushushu|dhofawushushu]] || [[word:dhofawukuku|dhofawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhofawuthu|dhofawuthu]] || [[word:dhofawuju|dhofawuju]] || [[word:dhofawushu|dhofawushu]] || [[word:dhofawuku|dhofawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhofawufthuf|dhofawufthuf]] || [[word:dhofawufjuf|dhofawufjuf]] || [[word:dhofawufshuf|dhofawufshuf]] || [[word:dhofawufkuf|dhofawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhofawethe|dhofawethe]] || [[word:dhofaweje|dhofaweje]] || [[word:dhofaweshe|dhofaweshe]] || [[word:dhofaweke|dhofaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhofawothotho|dhofawothotho]] || [[word:dhofawojojo|dhofawojojo]] || [[word:dhofawoshosho|dhofawoshosho]] || [[word:dhofawokoko|dhofawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhofawotho|dhofawotho]] || [[word:dhofawojo|dhofawojo]] || [[word:dhofawosho|dhofawosho]] || [[word:dhofawoko|dhofawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhofawofthof|dhofawofthof]] || [[word:dhofawofjof|dhofawofjof]] || [[word:dhofawofshof|dhofawofshof]] || [[word:dhofawofkof|dhofawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhofawïfthïf|dhofawïfthïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfjïf|dhofawïfjïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfshïf|dhofawïfshïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfkïf|dhofawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhofawïfthïfthïf|dhofawïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfjïfjïf|dhofawïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfshïfshïf|dhofawïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfkïfkïf|dhofawïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhofawïfthïf|dhofawïfthïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfjïf|dhofawïfjïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfshïf|dhofawïfshïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfkïf|dhofawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhofawïfthïf|dhofawïfthïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfjïf|dhofawïfjïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfshïf|dhofawïfshïf]] || [[word:dhofawïfkïf|dhofawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhofawæthæ|dhofawæthæ]] || [[word:dhofawæjæ|dhofawæjæ]] || [[word:dhofawæshæ|dhofawæshæ]] || [[word:dhofawækæ|dhofawækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhofawathatha|dhofawathatha]] || [[word:dhofawajaja|dhofawajaja]] || [[word:dhofawashasha|dhofawashasha]] || [[word:dhofawakaka|dhofawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhofawatha|dhofawatha]] || [[word:dhofawaja|dhofawaja]] || [[word:dhofawasha|dhofawasha]] || [[word:dhofawaka|dhofawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhofawafthaf|dhofawafthaf]] || [[word:dhofawafjaf|dhofawafjaf]] || [[word:dhofawafshaf|dhofawafshaf]] || [[word:dhofawafkaf|dhofawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhofawasha|dhofawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhofawshësha|dhofawshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhofawrosha|dhofawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhofawmusha|dhofawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhofawyasha|dhofawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhofawnkshësha|godhofawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhofawnkrosha|godhofawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhofawnkmusha|godhofawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhofawnkyasha|godhofawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhofafawasha|dhofafawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhofafawshësha|dhofafawshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhofafawrosha|dhofafawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhofafawmusha|dhofafawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhofafawyasha|dhofafawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhofafawnkshësha|godhofafawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhofafawnkrosha|godhofafawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhofafawnkmusha|godhofafawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhofafawnkyasha|godhofafawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhefæwasha|dhefæwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhefæwshësha|dhefæwshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhefæwrosha|dhefæwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhefæwmusha|dhefæwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhefæwyasha|dhefæwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhefæwnkshësha|godhefæwnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhefæwnkrosha|godhefæwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhefæwnkmusha|godhefæwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhefæwnkyasha|godhefæwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhofawasha|dhofawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhofawshësha|dhofawshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhofawrosha|dhofawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhofawmusha|dhofawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhofawyasha|dhofawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhofawnkshësha|godhofawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhofawnkrosha|godhofawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhofawnkmusha|godhofawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhofawnkyasha|godhofawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
